sentences.target: Ich rufe jede Woche meine Oma an.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈʁuːfə ˈjeːdə ˈvɔxə ˈmaɪ̯nə ˈoːma an/

translations.de: Ich rufe jede Woche meine Oma an.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈʁuːfə ˈjeːdə ˈvɔxə ˈmaɪ̯nə ˈoːma an/
translations.en: I call my grandma every week.
translations.es: Llamo a mi abuela cada semana.
translations.yue: 我每個星期都打畀阿嫲。
translations.pt: Eu ligo para a minha avó toda semana.
translations.he: אני מתקשר לסבתא שלי כל שבוע.
translations.vi: Tôi gọi cho bà mỗi tuần.
translations.nl: Ik bel mijn oma elke week.
translations.hi: मैं हर हफ्ते अपनी दादी को फोन करता हूँ.
translations.el: Τηλεφωνώ στη γιαγιά μου κάθε εβδομάδα.
translations.nb: Jeg ringer bestemoren min hver uke.
translations.id: Saya menelepon nenek saya setiap minggu.
translations.sv: Jag ringer min mormor varje vecka.
translations.ro: O sun pe bunica mea în fiecare săptămână.
translations.da: Jeg ringer til min mormor hver uge.
translations.ja: 私は毎週おばあちゃんに電話します。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite verb, present indicative 1st person singular; main verb; part of the separable verb 'anrufen' completed by the particle 'an'.
Determiner 'every'; feminine singular accusative; modifies 'Woche' in a temporal accusative phrase (frequency).
Common noun, feminine singular; temporal accusative complement indicating frequency.
Possessive determiner, 1st person singular; feminine accusative; modifies 'Oma' (direct object).
Common noun, feminine singular accusative; direct object of the verb.
Separable verbal particle completing the verb 'anrufen'; placed at clause-final position.

sentences.target: Sie liest jede Nacht ein Buch.

translations.de: Sie liest jede Nacht ein Buch.
translations.en: She reads a book every night.
translations.es: Ella lee un libro todas las noches.
translations.fr: Elle lit un livre tous les soirs.
translations.it: Lei legge un libro ogni sera.
translations.pt: Ela lê um livro todas as noites.
translations.tr: O her gece bir kitap okur.
translations.vi: Cô ấy đọc một cuốn sách mỗi tối.
translations.nl: Ze leest elke avond een boek.
translations.hi: वह हर रात एक किताब पढ़ती है.
translations.nb: Hun leser en bok hver kveld.
translations.sv: Hon läser en bok varje kväll.
translations.ro: Ea citește o carte în fiecare seară.
translations.da: Hun læser en bog hver aften.
translations.ja: 彼女は毎晩本を読みます。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 3rd person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite verb, present indicative 3rd person singular; main verb.
Determiner 'every'; feminine singular (form for nominative/accusative); modifies 'Nacht' in a temporal accusative phrase.
Common noun, feminine singular; temporal accusative complement (time expression).
Indefinite article; neuter accusative; modifies 'Buch' as the direct object.
Common noun, neuter singular accusative; direct object of 'liest'.

sentences.target: Der Bus kommt fast jede Minute.

translations.de: Der Bus kommt fast jede Minute.
translations.en: The bus comes almost every minute.
translations.es: El autobús pasa casi cada minuto.
translations.fr: Le bus passe presque toutes les minutes.
translations.zh-Hans: 公交车几乎每分钟都来一趟。
translations.yue: 巴士差唔多每分鐘就有一班。
translations.pt: O ônibus passa quase a cada minuto.
translations.vi: Xe buýt gần như mỗi phút đều đến.
translations.nl: De bus komt bijna elke minuut.
translations.hu: A busz szinte minden percben jön.
translations.hi: बस लगभग हर मिनट आती है.
translations.el: Το λεωφορείο έρχεται σχεδόν κάθε λεπτό.
translations.ro: Autobuzul vine aproape în fiecare minut.
translations.ja: バスはほぼ毎分来ます。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; masculine nominative; modifies the subject 'Bus'.
Common noun, masculine singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite verb, present indicative 3rd person singular; main verb.
Adverb of degree; modifies the frequency phrase 'jede Minute'.
Determiner 'every'; feminine singular accusative; modifies 'Minute' in a temporal/frequency phrase.
Common noun, feminine singular; temporal/frequency complement.

translations.es: Él responde a cada pregunta rápido.
translations.fr: Il répond vite à chaque question.
translations.it: Lui risponde velocemente a ogni domanda.
translations.zh-Hans: 他对每个问题都回答得很快。
translations.ru: Он быстро отвечает на каждый вопрос.
translations.pt: Ele responde rápido a cada pergunta.
translations.he: הוא עונה מהר על כל שאלה.
translations.vi: Anh ấy trả lời mọi câu hỏi rất nhanh.
translations.ar: هو يجيب على كل سؤال بسرعة.
translations.uk: Він швидко відповідає на кожне запитання.
translations.hi: वह हर सवाल का जवाब जल्दी देता है.
translations.pl: On szybko odpowiada na każde pytanie.
translations.nb: Han svarer raskt på hvert spørsmål.
translations.id: Dia menjawab setiap pertanyaan dengan cepat.
translations.sv: Han svarar snabbt på varje fråga.
translations.ro: El răspunde repede la fiecare întrebare.
translations.da: Han svarer hurtigt på hvert spørgsmål.
translations.ja: 彼はすべての質問にすぐ答えます。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 3rd person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite verb, present indicative 3rd person singular; transitive main verb with inseparable prefix 'be-'.
Determiner 'every'; feminine singular accusative; modifies 'Frage' (direct object).
Common noun, feminine singular accusative; direct object of the verb.
Adverb of manner; modifies 'beantwortet'.
